prediction.chief_complaint: itchy red rash on forearms and back of knees for two weeks

medications.name: triamcinolone
medications.frequency: twice daily for up to 2 weeks

diagnoses.description: atopic dermatitis, possibly worsened by irritant body wash

plan: switch back to gentle, fragrance-free body wash
use thick fragrance-free moisturizer twice daily, especially within 3 minutes after showers
apply triamcinolone 0.1% ointment to affected areas twice daily for up to 2 weeks
cetirizine 10 mg once daily for itch
return if not improving in 2 weeks or signs of skin infection develop (pus, increased redness, warmth)

follow_up.reason: as needed if not improving in 2 weeks or signs of infection develop
